cards.title: ULIPs (Unit Linked Plans)
cards.content:
ΓÇó Combines Insurance + Investment. Premium is used to buy "Units" in a fund (Equity/Debt).
ΓÇó Value of units is tracked by NAV (Net Asset Value).
ΓÇó Highly transparent with visible charges (Mortality, Admin, Fund Management).

cards.title: Annuities & Pensions
cards.content:
ΓÇó Annuity: You pay a lump sum, and the insurer pays you a regular income for life.
ΓÇó Protects against the risk of "Living too long".
ΓÇó Immediate Annuity starts instantly; Deferred Annuity starts after a certain period.

items.text: Add-on benefits (like Critical Illness or Accidental Death) attached to a base policy for a small extra cost.
Covers many people under a single Master Policy (e.g., Employer-Employee). No individual underwriting.
Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana: Γé╣2 Lakh life cover for Γé╣436/year.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: Variable Insurance: Sum assured or premiums can change based on the performance of the underlying investments.
Waiver of Premium Rider: If the insured gets disabled, future premiums are waived but the policy continues.
Micro Insurance is targeted at low-income groups, with low premiums and simplified procedures.
In ULIPs, the investment risk is borne entirely by the Policyholder, not the insurer.
Annuity Certain: Pays for a guaranteed number of years (e.g., 10 years), whether the person lives or dies.
